avatar_adapter_spec.one_paragraph_implementation_summary: Godzilla should use profile `creature` with action `custom_profile`. Convert or test `godzilla-rigged-animated.zip!/source/Godzilla (New Glow).blend` to `public/avatars/godzilla.vrm`, enable arms, creature_head, creature_jaw, legs, and disable face_touch, facial_expressions, fingers, standard_humanoid_full_body until runtime tests pass.
